title: nepeta italica subsp. cadmea
intro: Nepeta italica subsp. cadmea, also known as Catmint or Nepeta, is a subspecies of the Nepeta genus, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This herb is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Nepeta italica subsp. cadmea include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and stress, and promoting restful sleep. Nepeta italica subsp. cadmea can be consumed as a herbal tea, used as a tincture, or added to topical creams for its medicinal properties, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
